name: Dwarven Ale
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on Blacksmiths owned.

name: Expert Masonry
effect: Reduce all building cost multipliers by 0.01 (becomes 1.14).

name: Mining Prodigies
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Excavation depth.

name: Underground Citadels
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Gems owned.

name: Indestructible Treasure
effect: Increase clicking reward based on buildings owned.

name: Bearded Assistants
effect: Increase production of assistants based on time this Era.

name: Battlehammers
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Dwarven Coins found this Era.
formula: (2.5 * ln(1+x)^2.5)%, where x = Dwarven Coins found this Era

name: Overwatch
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: +(50 + 35 * x^0.7), where x = longest spell duration

name: Solidity
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on highest High Bastions built this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.2 * x^0.8)%, where x = highest High Bastions this Reincarnation

name: Stonetalking
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on the higher of Maximum Mana or Mana Regeneration.
formula: (3 * ln(1 + max(x,y))^3)%, where x = Max Mana, y = Mana Regen

name: Refined Minerals
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration and Max Mana based on highest time as Order, Balance, or Chaos this Reincarnation.
formula: (2.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = highest alignment time this Reincarnation
